name: Zap #4: Personal Star emails → Notion inbox (Alyson)

parameters.content:
## Personal: Star emails → Notion inbox (Alyson)
**Mirror of Work workflow — polls Tom's personal Gmail**

### Flow:
1. Schedule Trigger — polls every minute
2. Gmail — gets starred emails from Tom's personal Gmail
3. Code — dedup via staticData
4. Code — extract contact, format HTML body
5. IF Has Attachments → Drive upload → build links
6. Notion — create task in MAIN Tasks
7. HTTP — append body as Notion page blocks

### SETUP NEEDED:
- Connect Tom's personal Gmail OAuth2 credential on 'Get Starred Emails'
- Set Google Drive folder on 'Upload to Google Drive'

nodes.name: Get Starred Emails
nodes.notes: NEEDS SETUP: Connect Tom's personal Gmail OAuth2 credential
